final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional product photography scene for a smartwatch.

Style/medium: needs a minimalist business aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include smartwatch as focal point, coffee cup and notebook arranged nearby
Subject: must include the smartwatch (one), coffee cup, notebook
Scene/backdrop: must include a marble tabletop surface
Lighting/mood: must be natural light from the side
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs to emphasize product texture and quality — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
